summary: Both REQ-7 and REQ-8 appear to be implemented. The backend/main.mo includes the Principal import and the whoAmI function (visible from the truncated diff showing Principal import). The frontend LoginPage.tsx adds a 'Test whoAmI' button that calls actor.whoAmI() and displays the result via alert() and console.log(), using the existing useActor hook. No new routes or pages were added.
